# Semantic conventions for ThousandEyes Data Model v1 Endpoint Experience metrics

This page documents metric semantic conventions for ThousandEyes Data Model v1 Endpoint Experience tests.

## HTTP server

### Metric: `http.metrics.availability`
<!-- semconv metric.http.metrics.availability -->
<!-- NOTE: THIS TEXT IS AUTOGENERATED. DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. -->
<!-- see templates/registry/markdown/snippet.md.j2 -->
<!-- prettier-ignore-start -->

| Name | Instrument Type | Unit (UCUM) | Description | Stability | Entity Associations |
| -------- | --------------- | ----------- | -------------- | --------- | ------ |
| `http.metrics.availability` | Gauge | `%` | Calculated depending on the errors reported during the test. In case there is any error, the availability is 0, otherwise 100%. | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | [`thousandeyes.stream`](entities/thousandeyes.md#thousandeyes-stream) |

**Attributes:**

| Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`account.id`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The ID of the account associated with the telemetry data. | `987654` |
| [`agent.geo.country.iso_code`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | ISO code for the country where the agent is located. | `US` |
| [`agent.geo.region.iso_code`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | ISO code for the region where the agent is located. | `US-CA` |
| [`agent.geoname.id`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | int | GeoNames ID of the ThousandEyes agent. | `5392171` |
| [`agent.id`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | int | Identifies the ThousandEyes agent that ran the test. | `12345` |
| [`agent.location`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Agent location. | `San Jose, CA, US` |
| [`agent.name`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Agent name. | `us-west-1a` |
| [`datapoint.created`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | int | Time in milliseconds when the datapoint was created by the agent. | `1700000000000` |
| [`datapoint.id`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Unique ID for each datapoint. | `dp-123456` |
| [`datapoint.received`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | int | Time in milliseconds when the datapoint was received by collectors. | `1700000001234` |
| [`error.type`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Error type for the test. | `timeout` |
| [`integration.id`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | ID of the integration used to route the datapoint to the external service. | `123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000` |
| [`permalink`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | URL for the network test instance that generated the data. | `https://app.thousandeyes.com/tests/12345` |
| [`response.code`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | int | HTTP response status code. | |
| [`round.id`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | int | Identifies the network test instance that generated the data. | `12345` |
| [`server.ip`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | IP of the targeted server. | `198.51.100.20` |
| [`test.domain`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Origin of the test data. | `endpoint` |
| [`test.id`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Identifies the ThousandEyes test. | `246810` |
| [`test.name`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Name of the ThousandEyes test. | `Endpoint HTTP monitor` |
| [`test.type`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | ThousandEyes test type. | `http-server`; `agent-to-server` |
| [`url`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The final URL after redirects. | `https://example.com/login` |

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- END AUTOGENERATED TEXT -->
<!-- endsemconv -->
